NEAR INTERSECTION OF SMITHTOWN DR AND TERRY ROAD. 4-5 FOOT OAK TREE UPROOTED AND FELL ON CARPORT AND PART OF HOUSE. ALSO HAD STURDY WOOD CARPORT LIFTED AND THROWN INTO AN ALUMINUM CARPORT NEXT DOOR. SEVEN POWER POLES DOWN OVER A HALF MILE STRETCH ON DALE MABRY HIGHWAY NEAR GERACI RD. FURTHER INVESTIGATION HAS DETERMINED IT WAS NOT A TORNADO BUT LIKELY WET DOWNBURST WINDS UP TO 50 MPH. CELL PHONE VIDEO OF DAMAGE SHOWED NO TREE OR BUILDING DAMAGE ALONG AREA. AREA HAS BEEN WET LAST 10 DAYS AND THIS MAY HAVE LED TO POLES BEING PUSHED OVER. FOILIAGE IS FLEXIBLE THUS NO DAMAGE. TIME BASED ON INTERVIEW WITH LOCAL RESIDENT.
TIME ESTIMATED BASED ON SEVERAL MEDIA REPORTS AND RADAR. ABOUT A DOZEN POWER POLES DAMAGED WITH POWER LINES ON DALE MABRY HIGHWAY NEAR GERACI RD. UNKNOWN IF THIS WAS A MICROBURST OR A TORNADO.

NWS STORM SURVEY DETERMINED A WEAK EF-1 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN ABOUT 7 MILES EAST OF I-75 JUST SOUTH OF FRUITVILLE ROAD. THE TORNADO WAS ABOUT 100 YARDS WIDE AND WAS ON THE GROUND FOR 2/3 OF A MILE. MOST OF THE DAMAGE OCCURED AT AND AROUND THE PLANT FARM.
